name: Brown Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brown rice as usual, but replace 6 tablespoons of water with 6 tablespoons of apple juice concentrate.
2. In a pot, beat the remaining ingredients together until well combined.
3. Mix in the cooked rice and stir until thickened.
4. Cook for an additional 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
5. Spoon into dishes and chill.
6. Sprinkle with nuts if desired.
